Dialog.name: MND_000_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I told him that I've ordered his drink...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}That must have impressed the monk. He[n]seems to have taken an interest in me...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 2 0 0}You look awfully young, kid. You still in high school?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}What're the employees here thinkin', letting someone like you in...?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}Well, since ya got me a drink, I'll pretend I'm your guardian so ya don't get thrown outta here. Take a seat.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 2 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 2 25 25}...Well? C'mon, kid, sit down. Havin' to look up at ya is strainin' my neck.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}So, you wanted to see where adults spend their time, eh? Not that I can't relate.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}{f 4 23 0 114 0 25 25}Well, don't worry, in two or three more years you'll be old enough to hang out here unsupervised.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 8 0 0}Just take it easy, kid. You'll be legal before ya know it. No need to rush.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_5_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Tryin' to act like an adult just makes ya look more like a kid, y'know.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}Heh... I guess that sounds funny comin' out of an alcohol-drinkin', cigar-smokin' monk, eh?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}Some people like it... So I guess it is? Probably. I have no idea.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}I just drink to get drunk. When you get drunk, it makes you feel good.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}What does it taste like...? Like leaves. I can't think of any other way to describe it.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It ain't supposed to taste good. I just smoke 'cause it helps me think straight.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Young people always think the grass is greener on the other side...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}Well, don't get your hopes up too high, kid. That way you won't be disappointed when things don't work out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}'Cause there might come a time when you'll hafta drink when you don't want to, and smoke just to get through the day...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_3_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}You're nothin' like those punks I see runnin' around town these days. Can't say the same for my son, though...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}...Always bein' taken in by the police for questioning... It's disgraceful.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_7_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}...I'm gonna remember your face, kid. Next time you come in here, I'm gonna have you thrown out. Got it?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}...I became acquainted with a strange monk.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 114 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}Well, when you've had your fill, hit the road... And don't come back.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I decided to go back to the dorm.[n]{f 1 1}
